description_long: This is a large, rectangular office desk with a dark, matte finish, featuring a flat and spacious tabletop suitable for paperwork, computers, or other office equipment. The front side of the desk is equipped with two sets of drawers, each set containing two drawers, and one of the drawers is shown partially open, revealing metal handles. The desk stands on four straight legs, providing stability and ample legroom beneath the tabletop. The sides and back of the desk are solid panels, giving it a robust and professional appearance. The overall design is utilitarian and functional, with no decorative elements, making it ideal for work environments. The construction appears to be primarily wood or engineered wood, possibly with metal hardware for the drawer handles and runners.
description: A large, dark office desk with a flat top and two sets of drawers on the front, featuring metal handles and a sturdy, professional design.
description_view_0: The desk is viewed from the side, showing a solid panel and one leg, with a drawer handle visible on the right.
description_view_1: The front of the desk displays two sets of drawers with metal handles, one drawer partially open, and ample legroom in the center.
description_view_2: The opposite side view shows a solid panel and leg, with no visible drawers or handles.
description_view_3: The back of the desk is a plain, solid panel with no drawers or handles, emphasizing its simple construction.
attribute_orientation: The side with the drawers and open leg space is intended to face the user, serving as the front, while the solid panel side is the back.
attribute_usage_context: office workstation for administrative or computer-based tasks
